module_info.docstring:
Test Modal Terminal Tool

This script tests that the Modal terminal backend is correctly configured
and can execute commands in Modal sandboxes.

Usage:
    # Run with Modal backend
    TERMINAL_ENV=modal python tests/test_modal_terminal.py

    # Or run directly (will use whatever TERMINAL_ENV is set in .env)
    python tests/test_modal_terminal.py

functions.name: test_modal_requirements
functions.docstring: Test that Modal requirements are met.

functions.name: test_python_execution
functions.docstring: Test executing Python code in Modal.

functions.name: test_pip_install
functions.docstring: Test installing a package with pip in Modal.

functions.name: test_filesystem_persistence
functions.docstring: Test that filesystem persists between commands in the same task.

functions.name: test_environment_isolation
functions.docstring: Test that different task_ids get isolated environments.
